headline: Is Kroger (KR) Undervalued On Its Giant Eagle Deal And Recent Pullback?
summary: Kroger (KR) is back in focus after agreeing to acquire supermarket chain Giant Eagle for US$1.65b in cash, while also taking on about US$400m of the target’s outstanding liabilities. See our latest analysis for Kroger. The Kroger share price has pulled back over the past three months, with a 90 day share price return down 19.85% and a 30 day share price return down 8.37%, even as the company announced the Giant Eagle acquisition, continued buybacks and a higher dividend. Despite this shorter...

headline: Kroger (KR) Names McDonald's Veteran Emilee De Martino Chief People Officer
summary: Kroger (NYSE:KR) has appointed Emilee De Martino as Executive Vice President and Chief People Officer. De Martino joins Kroger from McDonald's, where she worked on culture change and large scale transformation. The new role places her in charge of Kroger's people strategy and human capital agenda. Kroger enters this leadership change with its stock at $58.25 and a mixed return profile, with the share price up 32.7% over the past 3 years and 69.1% over 5 years, but down 16.8% over the past...
